races.name: Agnostos
races.description: Agnostos are humanoids known for their profound mental discipline and a deep, spiritual connection to the Goddess Elana. Their minds are naturally fortified against intrusion and they possess the innate ability to bridge thoughts between living beings.
races.biology: Agnostos stand between 1,50 and 1,85 meters tall and average 63 kg. They reach adulthood in their late teens but are considered young until the age of 25. On average, they live about 80 years.
